name: DriftAgent — cross-repo drift + authority + canon + traceable issues
summary: Trolls every canonical source (rapp-god/rapp-map/RAPP/RAPP-Bible), flags cross-repo schema/invariant drift, names which source WINS per the authority order, materializes the resolved canon (so the tree blossoms instead of re-traversing), prunes dead branches, traverses the ecosystem graph for blast-radius, and files traceable GitHub Issues (idempotent, dry-run default) for watcher agents to fix.
tagline: Make the whole ecosystem align — detect drift, name the winner, file the fix.
author: Kody Wildfeuer
